info.name: Microsoft Azure Scheduled Query Rules API
info.description: Azure Monitor client to create/update/delete Scheduled Query Rules.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Insights Scheduledqueryrules
